title: Supreme Controller | Bhagavad Gita Sessions | Chapter 11 38- 44 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: So, today the discussion is on the topic Supreme Controller, text number 38 to 44 from the
11th chapter of the Gita, based on Srila Prabhupada's teachings.
Translation, you are the original personality of Godhead.
You are the only sanctuary of this manifested cosmic world.
You know everything and you are all that is knowable.
You are above the material modes, O limitless form.
This whole cosmic manifestation is pervaded by you.
Some of us may not be very regular.
These are the words spoken by Arjuna to Lord Krishna.
On seeing his...
Vishwaroopa, universal form.
So, what are the words?
You are the original personality of Godhead.
You are the only sanctuary of this manifested cosmic world.

Entire creation of the Lord.
Morning we discussed, I'll just briefly touch.
Everything we see around us.
Everything, the entire creation is nothing but Lord and his energies.
Broadly speaking, there are two parts of the creation.
What are the two parts?
There is the spiritual world and there is material world.
Spiritual world is constituted by, it's formed by, it's managed by the spiritual energy of the Lord which is also called the internal energy.
And this material world is manifested by and is managed by the external energy of the Lord which is also called material energy.
So the entire creation is nothing but the Lord and his energy.
Whatever we see around us is nothing but the Lord and his energy.
This material energy is also called Durga or Maya.

this material creation, we are living in this planet Earth which is part of the solar system, sun in the center,
and then like that we have many stars, each of them having its own family of planets.
